name: @elizaos/plugin-calendly
description: Calendly integration plugin for elizaOS agents — event types, scheduled events, cancellations, and booking-link handoff via Calendly v2 API

CALENDLY_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Calendly v2 personal access token used by CalendlyService to authenticate API requests.

CALENDLY_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_KEY.description: Signing key Calendly uses to sign inbound webhook deliveries. Signature enforcement is deferred; the key is declared so operators can configure it in advance.
